debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ∃ C, ∃ (_ : Convex ℝ C), ∃ x y, ∀ (i : Fin n → ℕ) (s : Set (Fin n → ℕ)), ∑ k, x k (i k) + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s

failed_attempts:
by
    apply Exists.intro { z | z (Fin.last 1) ≥ 0 }
    apply Exists.intro (convex_halfspace_ge _ _)
    apply Exists.intro fun k i => Pi.single (Fin.castSucc k) i
    apply Exists.intro fun s => Pi.single (Fin.last 1) (if s = ∅ then -1 else 0)
    intro i s
    simp [Pi.single_apply, Fin.sum_univ_castSucc, Fin.sum_univ_last]
    split_ifs with hs
    · simp_all
    · simp_all

by
  let C : Set (Fin (n + 2) → ℝ) := {z | z (Fin.last 1) ≥ 0}
  have hC : Convex ℝ C := by
    intro a b ha hb t ht
    simp only [C, Fin.last, Fin.val_last] at *
    exact le_of_lt (by linarith)
  use C, hC
  use fun k i => Pi.single (Fin.castSucc k) i
  use fun s => Pi.single (Fin.last 1) (if (fun i => (fun k => i k) ⁻¹' s) = ∅ then 0 else -1)
  intro i s
  simp only [Pi.single_apply, Fin.castSucc_ne_last, Fin.last, Fin.val_last, add_zero, zero_add]
  split_ifs with h
  · simp_all
  · simp_all

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, h⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  refine' ⟨fun z ↦ C (Fin.tail (Fin.tail z)), _, fun k i ↦ Fin.cons 0 (Fin.cons 0 (x i)), fun s ↦ Fin.cons 0 (Fin.cons 0 (y s)), _⟩
  · exact convex_preimage _ hC
  · intro i s
    simp only [Fin.tail_cons, Fin.cons_val_zero, Fin.cons_val_succ, Fin.sum_univ_succ,
      Fin.sum_univ_zero, zero_add]
    exact h _ _

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x, y, h⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  refine' ⟨fun z ↦ C (fun i ↦ if i < 3 then z (Fin.castLE (by linarith) i) else 0),
    by exact convex_on_pi_of_finset _ fun i _ ↦ if i < 3 then hC else convex_univ,
    fun k i ↦ fun j ↦ if j < 3 then x i j else 0,
    fun s ↦ fun j ↦ if j < 3 then y s j else 0,
    fun i s ↦ _⟩
  simp_all [Fin.sum_univ_castSucc, Fin.sum_univ_castLE]

by
  obtain ⟨C, hC, x₀, y₀, h₀⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
  use fun z ↦ C.prod (Set.univ : Set (Fin n → ℝ))
  use convex_prod hC (convex_univ : Convex ℝ (Set.univ : Set (Fin n → ℝ)))
  use fun k i => Pi.fin_append₁ (fun _ ↦ 0) (x₀ i)
  use fun s => Pi.fin_append₁ (fun k => (Classical.choose (Finset.nonempty_of_ne_empty (Finset.univ_nonempty)))) (y₀ (Set.image (fun f : Fin n → ℕ ↦ fun k => f k) s))
  intro i s
  simp only [Pi.mem_prod, Pi.fin_append₁_apply_zero, Pi.fin_append₁_apply_one, Fin.sum_univ_succ,
    add_right_inj, forall_const, true_and]
  exact h₀ _ _

by
    obtain ⟨C, hC, x', y', h⟩ := exists_convex_r3_vc_eq_infty
    use fun z => C (Fin.tail z)

    use fun k i =>

    use fun s =>
      {0 := y' (Set.image (fun f => f 0) s); 1 := y' (Set.image (fun f => f 1) s); default := 0}
    intro i s
    simp_all [Fin.tail_succ]
